rootCause: The hydration helper only checked for existing data-hydrated=true elements, so when the page initially rendered data-hydrated="false" and later hydrated, tests could interact before Svelte event handlers were attached, preventing process creation from reaching IndexedDB.
resolution: Wait until at least one data-hydrated marker flips to true (or none exist) before proceeding so e2e steps run after client hydration.
references: frontend/e2e/custom-content.spec.ts - should show a custom process on the related item detail page
